form.label: Airia Platform - AI Cost Monitoring
form.description: Monitor AI model costs, token usage, and spending trends

search.query: `airia_base_with_fields` | where cost_numeric > 0 | stats sum(cost_numeric) as total_cost | eval total_cost="$".round(total_cost, 4)
`airia_base_with_fields` | where tokens_numeric > 0 | stats sum(tokens_numeric) as total_tokens | eval total_tokens=tostring(total_tokens,"commas")
`airia_base_with_fields` | where cost_numeric > 0 | timechart span=1h sum(cost_numeric) as "Cost (USD)"
`airia_base_with_fields` | where cost_numeric > 0 | stats sum(cost_numeric) as total_cost by model_display | eval total_cost=round(total_cost, 4) | sort -total_cost
`airia_base_with_fields` | where cost_numeric > 0 | stats sum(cost_numeric) as total_cost by provider | eval total_cost=round(total_cost, 4) | sort -total_cost
`airia_base_with_fields` | where tokens_numeric > 0 | stats sum(tokens_numeric) as total_tokens by model_display | sort -total_tokens

`airia_base_with_fields` | where cost_numeric > 0 AND tokens_numeric > 0 | stats count as "API Calls" sum(tokens_numeric) as "Total Tokens" avg(tokens_numeric) as "Avg Tokens per Call" sum(cost_numeric) as "Total Cost" avg(cost_numeric) as "Avg Cost per Call" by model_display | eval "Total Cost"="$".round('Total Cost', 4) | eval "Avg Cost per Call"="$".round('Avg Cost per Call', 6) | eval "Avg Tokens per Call"=round('Avg Tokens per Call', 0) | rename model_display as "Model" | sort -"Total Cost" | head 20

`airia_base_with_fields` | where prompt_name!="null" AND cost_numeric > 0 | stats count as "Usage Count" sum(cost_numeric) as "Total Cost" avg(cost_numeric) as "Avg Cost per Use" by prompt_name | eval "Total Cost"="$".round('Total Cost', 4) | eval "Avg Cost per Use"="$".round('Avg Cost per Use', 6) | rename prompt_name as "Prompt Name" | sort -"Total Cost" | head 20

`airia_base_with_fields` | where cost_numeric > 0 | bucket _time span=1d | stats count as "API Calls" sum(cost_numeric) as "Total Cost" sum(tokens_numeric) as "Total Tokens" by _time | eval "Total Cost"="$".round('Total Cost', 4) | eval "Total Tokens"=tostring('Total Tokens',"commas") | eval Date=strftime(_time, "%Y-%m-%d") | table Date "API Calls" "Total Tokens" "Total Cost" | sort -Date | head 20
